posts.text:
I hope this is right.


Open Source Intel (@Osint613)

A senior IDF military official:  

"The Americans didn’t believe we would succeed in the decapitation strike.  
We destroyed between 160–190 launchers, disabled another 200, and around 150 remain active. The missile crews are afraid to go out; there are desertions and refusals to follow orders. Every day we hunt down several launchers.  

We’ve entered a perhaps unheroic and monotonic stage of systematic destruction of command and control he

“Good afternoon. It’s Friday. We made the special lady feel so bad about taking out luggage she stayed home! Thumb guy is still missing but we took the morning off to celebrate our victory. Also, I love you.”

Megyn Kelly (@megynkelly)

You think protecting Erika means calling out Candace; I think if you don’t wish to call attention to a negative attack, don’t call attention to it. Does that work for you Ben? May I have your approval now? No, I don’t think so. 

Bc you and your little cohort of sick followers aren’t mad about anything involving me and Erika Kirk, who you barely know (trust me; I’ve checked). You turned on me when I wouldn’t de-friend Tucker whose criticism of Israel you can’t stand -

Why doesn’t Sweden grow its own avocados!?! Why should Mexicans have to pay for herring from Scandinavia?


Eric Boehm (@EricBoehm87)

The Trump administration's position is that every country on Earth should be producing exactly as much of every item and commodity as it needs to consume?





— https://nitter.net/EricBoehm87/status/2032110568153260057#m

lol yes that’s my “whole point” of being in media is whatever you’re babbling about. So much projection from this Israel-hating poltroon.


Cenk Uygur (@cenkuygur)

Everyone on this panel are DISGUSTING BIGOTS who spend all their time trying to do character assassinations of Khalil, Mamdani and his wife. They despise Muslims. Whole point of having @jaketapper and @JonahDispatch in media is to smear anyone who criticizes their beloved Israel.



— https://nitter.net/cenkuygur/status/2032210837763

“Good morning. It’s Thursday. Thumb guy has been missing for several years, but I’m thinking we might have a sleepover at Kirsten’s. That would be very exciting. It’s all very confusing. I’m a furball of emotion. Also, I love you.”
“Good morning. It’s Friday. Don’t be frightened by my collar. It’s for scaring away mean dogs. At least that’s what they told me. Also, I love you.”
I forgot I’ve had an account here since 2023. Kicking the tires now.
Giving this a whirl. This is my first Bluesky post and, yes, I'm tweeting pictures of my dogs. Don't say you weren't warned.
